extraction_reasoning: The litigation tables separate matters against the Company from matters against Promoters/Directors, and no “By” rows are disclosed. I counted 2 criminal proceedings against Promoters/Directors, 7 statutory/regulatory actions against the Company and Promoters/Directors combined (3 + 4), and 10 direct/indirect tax proceedings against the Company only; the 10 promoter/director tax matters were excluded from the tax count. The quantified aggregate against the Company is ₹25.92 million, comprising ₹25.54 million of direct tax matters, ₹0.38 million of indirect tax matters, and ₹0 million of other matters; this is converted to ₹2.592 crore (₹25.92 million ÷ 10). The contingent-liabilities figure is the explicitly stated total of ₹721.33 million as at June 30, 2019, converted to ₹72.133 crore (₹721.33 million ÷ 10), rather than a re-sum of components. The disclosed percentages relate to products, brands, related-party transactions, and other segments rather than company-wide top-five or top-ten customers; no qualifying concentration percentage is provided. The source monetary tables use ₹ million, converted to crore at 10 million per crore.
